response:
I'm excited to share our proposed shooting schedule with you. We've managed to fit all the necessary scenes into a tight 8-day shoot, spanning from Day 1 to Day 8. Here's a breakdown of what we'll be capturing each day: 

On Day 1, we'll be filming at the downtown high-rise office. Day 2 takes us to the airplane cabin. We'll then move on to the Paper Street House, covering the living room and kitchen on Days 3 and 4, respectively. The exterior scenes follow, with the dive bar parking lot on Day 5, Dean's apartment building on Day 6, and the basement bar on Day 7. Finally, we'll wrap up with the support group scene at the church basement on Day 8.

I'm pleased to report that we were able to stick to all the original constraints, ensuring that our schedule meets all the necessary requirements. Our total cost comes in at $11,500, which is well within our budget of $999,999. This schedule offers a great balance of efficiency and creativity, allowing us to bring our vision to life without breaking the bank. I'm confident that this schedule will serve as a solid foundation for a successful shoot, and I look forward to working with you to bring this project to fruition.
